ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ranking_categories" (
  "ranking_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking category */,
  "min_ranking" INTEGER /* Minimum ranking value for this category */,
  "max_ranking" INTEGER /* Maximum ranking value for this category */,
  "ranking_category_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking category (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of reward (e.g., item, in-game currency, virtual good) */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_value" INTEGER /* Value of the reward */,
  "reward_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reward image */,
  "reward_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to earn the reward (e.g., complete level 5, collect 10 coins) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_reward_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_type_id") REFERENCES reward_types ("reward_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_types" (
  "reward_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward type */,
  "reward_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward type */,
  "reward_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "current_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "ranking_category_id" INTEGER /* Ranking category the player belongs to */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Current experience of the player */,
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player is playing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_ranking_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_category_id") REFERENCES ranking_categories ("ranking_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "player_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward earned */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., claimed, pending, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_history" (
  "ranking_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ranking_category_id" INTEGER /* Ranking category the player belongs to */,
  "old_ranking" INTEGER /* Old ranking of the player */,
  "new_ranking" INTEGER /* New ranking of the player */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_history_ranking_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_category_id") REFERENCES ranking_categories ("ranking_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., multiplayer, single-player) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the level belongs to */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "level_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to complete the level (e.g., collect 10 coins, defeat 5 enemies) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_level_progress" (
  "player_level_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player level progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the player is progressing through */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's progress (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player level progress was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player level progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_level_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_level_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_level_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES game_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_redemptions" (
  "reward_redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward redemption entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who redeemed the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward redeemed */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was redeemed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward redemption was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward redemption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_redemptions_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_redemptions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
